query:
SELECT
                c.id,
                c.server_id,
                c.name,
                c.topic,
                c.channel_type as "channel_type!: String",
                c.position,
                c.is_private,
                c.is_read_only,
                c.encrypted,
                c.slowmode_seconds,
                c.created_at,
                c.updated_at
            FROM channels c
            WHERE c.server_id = $1
              AND (
                  c.is_private = false
                  OR EXISTS (
                      SELECT 1 FROM server_members sm
                      WHERE sm.server_id = c.server_id
                        AND sm.user_id = $2
                        AND (
                            sm.role IN ($3, $4)
                            OR EXISTS (
                                SELECT 1 FROM channel_role_access cra
                                WHERE cra.channel_id = c.id AND cra.role = sm.role
                            )
                        )
                  )
              )
            ORDER BY c.position
